Who We Are

ARTHA Architects,
Landscape & Interior

We are a full-spectrum design studio based in Sangli, Maharashtra. Our work spans residential architecture, commercial buildings, landscape design, and interior architecture — united by a single conviction: every space should resonate with meaning.

We begin each project by listening deeply — to the site, to the climate, and to the lives that will unfold within these walls. The result is architecture that feels inevitable, as if it could not have been any other way.

Studio Location

How We Work

Our Process

01
Discovery

Deep listening — site visits, client conversations, and context research form the foundation of every project.

02
Concept

Translating insights into a clear architectural idea — sketched, modelled, and refined until it feels inevitable.

03
Design Development

Meticulous detailing across all scales — from building form and facades down to materials, light, and hardware.

04
Delivery

Close on-site collaboration through construction ensuring every detail of the vision is realised with care.
